stemHtml: The risk of spatial disorientation increases when…

options.a: the pilot is buckled tightly to his/her seat and cannot sense the attitude changes of the aircraft by the Seat-of-the-Pants sense.
options.b: information from the vestibular organ in the inner ear are ignored.
options.c: there is contradictory information between the instruments and the vestibular organs.
options.d: the pilot is performing an effective instrument cross-check and is ignoring illusions.
